## Installation (macOS 15.0+, Apple Silicon only)

1. Download `Image-Voice-Memos-v0.1.1.dmg`
2. Open DMG, drag app to Applications
3. Open Terminal and run:
   ```
   xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Image-Voice-Memos.app
   ```
   Note: Give Terminal Full Disk Access in System Settings > Privacy & Security if needed.
4. Launch the app and grant Microphone + Speech Recognition permissions when prompted
